title: HWAXAgentAuditEvent
description: Single audit event emitted by the agent. The hub stores these in the existing audit_log table under actor='system:hwax-agent' (see backend/app/db/models/audit_log.py). The 'kind' enum is intentionally disjoint from install-report.status — kind classifies the event, status classifies the terminal outcome of one install attempt.

kind.description: Event class. Note: 'install' here means 'an install was attempted/observed'; the granular outcome (success|failed|...) belongs in install-report.status.

payload.description: Free-form, kind-specific context (e.g. AV product name for av_block, sha256 actual/expected for sha256_mismatch). Hub stores as JSONB and does not interpret beyond logging.
